nasb.text: Then the people went out into the field against Israel, and the battle took place in the forest of Ephraim.

esv.text: So the army went out into the field against Israel, and the battle was fought in the forest of Ephraim.

cnv.text: 眾人出到田野迎戰以色列人；戰爭發生在以法蓮的樹林裡。

ccb.text: 大卫的军队在以法莲的树林里跟以色列人交战。
